title: Verify the display of Ligue 1 matches
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'France: Ligue 1' section. | Verify that the section displays the correct matches with their times and teams.
expected_result: The 'France: Ligue 1' section should display the correct matches with their times and teams.

title: Verify the display of Ligue 2 matches
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'France: Ligue 2' section. | Verify that the section displays the correct matches with their times and teams.
expected_result: The 'France: Ligue 2' section should display the correct matches with their times and teams.

title: Verify the display of National matches
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'France: National' section. | Verify that the section displays the correct matches with their times and teams.
expected_result: The 'France: National' section should display the correct matches with their times and teams.

title: Verify the chevron icon functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'France: Ligue 1' section. | Click on the chevron icon next to a match. | Verify that the detailed view of the match is displayed.
expected_result: The detailed view of the match should be displayed.

title: Verify the promotional banner interaction
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'France: Ligue 1' section. | Click on the promotional banner. | Verify that the app navigates to the Betclic landing page.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the Betclic landing page.

title: Verify the menu icon functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'France: Ligue 1' section. | Click on the menu icon. | Verify that the menu options are displayed.
expected_result: The menu options should be displayed.

title: Verify the plus sign icon functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'France: Ligue 1' section. | Click on the plus sign icon. | Verify that a new match is added to the favorites list.
expected_result: A new match should be added to the favorites list.

title: Verify the pencil icon functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'France: Ligue 1' section. | Click on the pencil icon next to a match. | Verify that the match details can be edited.
expected_result: The match details should be editable.
